meaning: n.倒塌,崩溃,失败,虚脱vi.倒塌,崩溃,瓦解,失败,病倒
examples: The bridge is liable to collapse at any moment.
A few days after his collapse he was sitting up in bed.
The walls were strengthened to protect them from collapse.
His dismissal sparked a collapse which will lead to defeat for England on Tuesday.
On 10 May a woman was pulled alive from the rubble, 17 days after the collapse.
